name: university-event-management-backend
description: Node.js + Express + PostgreSQL backend for a university event management platform.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/app.js && find src -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
scripts.db:schema: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f sql/schema.sql; else PGPASSWORD="$DB_PASSWORD" psql -h "$DB_HOST" -p "${DB_PORT:-5432}" -U "$DB_USER" -d "$DB_NAME" -f sql/schema.sql; fi'
scripts.db:sample: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f sql/sample-queries.sql; else PGPASSWORD="$DB_PASSWORD" psql -h "$DB_HOST" -p "${DB_PORT:-5432}" -U "$DB_USER" -d "$DB_NAME" -f sql/sample-queries.sql; fi'
